headline: Is Qualcomm (QCOM) Offering Value After Its Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether QUALCOMM's current share price represents real value or just market noise, this article breaks down what the numbers are actually saying about the stock. QUALCOMM shares last closed at US$131.24, with returns of 4.4% over 7 days, 1.1% over 30 days, a year-to-date decline of 24.1%, and 3-year and 5-year returns of 17.7% and 8.2% respectively. Recent coverage around QUALCOMM has focused on the company's role in semiconductors and wireless technologies, with...

headline: Chip Stocks Are on Pace for Their Longest Win Streak Since 2017
summary: Here’s a stat that might knock your socks off: The PHLX Semiconductor index is on track for its longest winning streak in nearly a decade. The SOX, as the index is called on Wall Street, has risen nine days in a row.

headline: Why Snap (SNAP) Stock Is Up Today

headline: Amazon Nears Deal for Globalstar in Push to Rival Musk’s Starlink
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Amazon.com Inc. is in advanced talks to acquire satellite operator Globalstar Inc. in a deal that would boost the tech giant’s efforts to build its own satellite operation, according to people familiar with the matter.A transaction could be announced as soon as Tuesday, said the people, who asked not to be identified because the information was private.A final agreement hasn’t been reached and talks might still end without one, or the timing could change, the people said.
